[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] [[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] <!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 28 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月廿八]] <!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 28 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月廿八]] {{wikidata link|Q839548}} [[Category:Pages linked to by wikidata]] [[Category:Matching pagename on wikidata]]

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 28 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月28日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 28일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 28 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月廿八]][[zh:五月廿八]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q839548]] Wikidata name: 28th day of the 5th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:07, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|May 28|qq=May 28}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月廿八|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 28일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 28''' is the 28th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|WD=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Kenkyū|Kenkyū]] 4th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1193|1193]] [[:en:June 28|June 28]]) – The brothers [[:en:Soga Sukenari|Soga Yūsēi]] and [[:en:Soga Tokimune|Soga Tokitomi]] avenged their father, [[:en:Kawazu Sukeyasu|Kawazu Yūtai]], by killing their enemy, [[:en:Kudō Suketsune|Kudō Yūkine]], during the conflict known as [[:en:Genkō War|Genkō no Ran]].<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://example.com|title=Reference needed|accessdate=2021-04|qq=}}</ref> * [[:en:Yuanhe|Genna]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1615|1615]] [[:en:June 1|June 1]]) – The shogun, [[:en:Tokugawa Ieyasu|Tokugawa Ieyasu]], mobilized his forces to confront the situation during the summer siege of Osaka. * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenmei]] 6th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1786|1786]] [[:en:June 1|June 1]]) – Under orders from the Tokugawa shogunate, the commander [[:en:Mogami Tokunai|Saigō Tokunai]] landed on 【Oki Province】 (隠岐) to secure the area. == Births == * [[:en:Gen'ei|Gen'ei]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1119|1119]] [[:en:July 7|July 7]]) – [[:en:Emperor Sutoku|Tendoku Tennō]], the 75th Emperor of Japan (died [[:en:1164|1164]]). * [[:en:Hōreki|Hōreki]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1754|1754]] [[:en:July 18|July 18]]) – {{ill|Kuroda Harutaka|ja|黒田治高|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuroda Harutaka|1=Kuroda Harutaka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11678626}}, the 8th lord of the Fukuoka Domain (died [[:en:1782|1782]]). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1834|1834]] [[:en:July 4|July 4]]) – {{ill|Katsura Hisatake|ja|桂久武|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katsura Hisatake|1=Katsura Hisatake|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11162562}}, a politician (died [[:en:1877|1877]]). * [[:en:Kōka|Kōka]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1847|1847]] [[:en:July 10|July 10]]) – {{ill|Monoatsukami Takami|ja|物集高見|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Monoatsukami Takami|1=Mozume Takami|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6537728}}, a scholar of national literature (died [[:en:1928|1928]]). * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1850|1850]] [[:en:July 7|July 7]]) – The first generation of the rakugo performer {{ill|Sanyūtei En'yū|ja|三遊亭圓遊|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sanyūtei En'yū|1=En'yū San'yūtei|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11357497}}, a famed storyteller (died [[:en:1907|1907]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Gangyō|Gangyō]] 4th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:880|880]] [[:en:July 9|July 9]]) – [[:en:Ariwara no Narihira|Ariwara no Narihira]], a renowned waka poet and one of the Six Immortals of Poetry (born [[:en:825|825]]). * [[:en:Kenkyū|Kenkyū]] 4th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1193|1193]] [[:en:June 28|June 28]]) – [[:en:Soga Sukenari|Soga Yūsēi]], a samurai and elder brother among the Soga brothers (born [[:en:1172|1172]]). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 20th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1615|1615]] [[:en:June 24|June 24]]) – [[:en:Katagiri Katsumoto|Katagiri Kagetora]], a daimyō (born [[:en:1556|1556]]).

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 28 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月28日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 28일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 28 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月廿八]][[zh:五月廿八]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q839548]] Wikidata name: 28th day of the 5th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:07, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|May 28|qq=May 28}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月廿八|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 28일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 28''' is the 28th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|WD=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Kenkyū|Kenkyū]] 4th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1193|1193]] [[:en:June 28|June 28]]) – The brothers [[:en:Soga Sukenari|Soga Yūsēi]] and [[:en:Soga Tokimune|Soga Tokitomi]] avenged their father, [[:en:Kawazu Sukeyasu|Kawazu Yūtai]], by killing their enemy, [[:en:Kudō Suketsune|Kudō Yūkine]], during the conflict known as [[:en:Genkō War|Genkō no Ran]].<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://example.com|title=Reference needed|accessdate=2021-04|qq=}}</ref> * [[:en:Yuanhe|Genna]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1615|1615]] [[:en:June 1|June 1]]) – The shogun, [[:en:Tokugawa Ieyasu|Tokugawa Ieyasu]], mobilized his forces to confront the situation during the summer siege of Osaka. * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenmei]] 6th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1786|1786]] [[:en:June 1|June 1]]) – Under orders from the Tokugawa shogunate, the commander [[:en:Mogami Tokunai|Saigō Tokunai]] landed on 【Oki Province】 (隠岐) to secure the area. == Births == * [[:en:Gen'ei|Gen'ei]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1119|1119]] [[:en:July 7|July 7]]) – [[:en:Emperor Sutoku|Tendoku Tennō]], the 75th Emperor of Japan (died [[:en:1164|1164]]). * [[:en:Hōreki|Hōreki]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1754|1754]] [[:en:July 18|July 18]]) – {{ill|Kuroda Harutaka|ja|黒田治高|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuroda Harutaka|1=Kuroda Harutaka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11678626}}, the 8th lord of the Fukuoka Domain (died [[:en:1782|1782]]). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1834|1834]] [[:en:July 4|July 4]]) – {{ill|Katsura Hisatake|ja|桂久武|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katsura Hisatake|1=Katsura Hisatake|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11162562}}, a politician (died [[:en:1877|1877]]). * [[:en:Kōka|Kōka]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1847|1847]] [[:en:July 10|July 10]]) – {{ill|Monoatsukami Takami|ja|物集高見|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Monoatsukami Takami|1=Mozume Takami|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6537728}}, a scholar of national literature (died [[:en:1928|1928]]). * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1850|1850]] [[:en:July 7|July 7]]) – The first generation of the rakugo performer {{ill|Sanyūtei En'yū|ja|三遊亭圓遊|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sanyūtei En'yū|1=En'yū San'yūtei|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11357497}}, a famed storyteller (died [[:en:1907|1907]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Gangyō|Gangyō]] 4th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:880|880]] [[:en:July 9|July 9]]) – [[:en:Ariwara no Narihira|Ariwara no Narihira]], a renowned waka poet and one of the Six Immortals of Poetry (born [[:en:825|825]]). * [[:en:Kenkyū|Kenkyū]] 4th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1193|1193]] [[:en:June 28|June 28]]) – [[:en:Soga Sukenari|Soga Yūsēi]], a samurai and elder brother among the Soga brothers (born [[:en:1172|1172]]). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 20th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1615|1615]] [[:en:June 24|June 24]]) – [[:en:Katagiri Katsumoto|Katagiri Kagetora]], a daimyō (born [[:en:1556|1556]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|27|5|29|4|28|6|5|0528|qq=}}
== References == {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}
[[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 28 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月廿八]]
{{translated page|ja|5月28日 (旧暦)|version=97894854|comment=Imported full ja history}}

[[ko:음력 5월 28일]] [[ja:5月28日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:五月廿八]]
[[ar:May 28 (Lunisolar)]]
[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] [[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] <!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 28 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月廿八]] <!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 28 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月廿八]] {{wikidata link|Q839548}} [[Category:Wikidata has short description]]

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月廿八|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 28일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 28''' is the 28th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|WD=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Kenkyū|Kenkyū]] 4th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1193|1193]] [[:en:June 28|June 28]]) – The brothers [[:en:Soga Sukenari|Soga Yūsēi]] and [[:en:Soga Tokimune|Soga Tokitomi]] avenged their father, [[:en:Kawazu Sukeyasu|Kawazu Yūtai]], by killing their enemy, [[:en:Kudō Suketsune|Kudō Yūkine]], during the conflict known as [[:en:Genkō War|Genkō no Ran]].<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://example.com|title=Reference needed|accessdate=2021-04|qq=}}</ref> * [[:en:Yuanhe|Genna]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1615|1615]] [[:en:June 1|June 1]]) – The shogun, [[:en:Tokugawa Ieyasu|Tokugawa Ieyasu]], mobilized his forces to confront the situation during the summer siege of Osaka. * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenmei]] 6th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1786|1786]] [[:en:June 1|June 1]]) – Under orders from the Tokugawa shogunate, the commander [[:en:Mogami Tokunai|Saigō Tokunai]] landed on 【Oki Province】 (隠岐) to secure the area. == Births == * [[:en:Gen'ei|Gen'ei]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1119|1119]] [[:en:July 7|July 7]]) – [[:en:Emperor Sutoku|Tendoku Tennō]], the 75th Emperor of Japan (died [[:en:1164|1164]]). * [[:en:Hōreki|Hōreki]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1754|1754]] [[:en:July 18|July 18]]) – {{ill|Kuroda Harutaka|ja|黒田治高|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuroda Harutaka|1=Kuroda Harutaka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11678626}}, the 8th lord of the Fukuoka Domain (died [[:en:1782|1782]]). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1834|1834]] [[:en:July 4|July 4]]) – {{ill|Katsura Hisatake|ja|桂久武|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katsura Hisatake|1=Katsura Hisatake|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11162562}}, a politician (died [[:en:1877|1877]]). * [[:en:Kōka|Kōka]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1847|1847]] [[:en:July 10|July 10]]) – {{ill|Monoatsukami Takami|ja|物集高見|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Monoatsukami Takami|1=Mozume Takami|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6537728}}, a scholar of national literature (died [[:en:1928|1928]]). * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1850|1850]] [[:en:July 7|July 7]]) – The first generation of the rakugo performer {{ill|Sanyūtei En'yū|ja|三遊亭圓遊|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sanyūtei En'yū|1=En'yū San'yūtei|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11357497}}, a famed storyteller (died [[:en:1907|1907]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Gangyō|Gangyō]] 4th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:880|880]] [[:en:July 9|July 9]]) – [[:en:Ariwara no Narihira|Ariwara no Narihira]], a renowned waka poet and one of the Six Immortals of Poetry (born [[:en:825|825]]). * [[:en:Kenkyū|Kenkyū]] 4th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1193|1193]] [[:en:June 28|June 28]]) – [[:en:Soga Sukenari|Soga Yūsēi]], a samurai and elder brother among the Soga brothers (born [[:en:1172|1172]]). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 20th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1615|1615]] [[:en:June 24|June 24]]) – [[:en:Katagiri Katsumoto|Katagiri Kagetora]], a daimyō (born [[:en:1556|1556]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|27|5|29|4|28|6|5|0528|qq=}}

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月廿八|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 28일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 28''' is the 28th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|WD=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Kenkyū|Kenkyū]] 4th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1193|1193]] [[:en:June 28|June 28]]) – The brothers [[:en:Soga Sukenari|Soga Yūsēi]] and [[:en:Soga Tokimune|Soga Tokitomi]] avenged their father, [[:en:Kawazu Sukeyasu|Kawazu Yūtai]], by killing their enemy, [[:en:Kudō Suketsune|Kudō Yūkine]], during the conflict known as [[:en:Genkō War|Genkō no Ran]].<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://example.com|title=Reference needed|accessdate=2021-04|qq=}}</ref> * [[:en:Yuanhe|Genna]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1615|1615]] [[:en:June 1|June 1]]) – The shogun, [[:en:Tokugawa Ieyasu|Tokugawa Ieyasu]], mobilized his forces to confront the situation during the summer siege of Osaka. * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenmei]] 6th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1786|1786]] [[:en:June 1|June 1]]) – Under orders from the Tokugawa shogunate, the commander [[:en:Mogami Tokunai|Saigō Tokunai]] landed on 【Oki Province】 (隠岐) to secure the area. == Births == * [[:en:Gen'ei|Gen'ei]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1119|1119]] [[:en:July 7|July 7]]) – [[:en:Emperor Sutoku|Tendoku Tennō]], the 75th Emperor of Japan (died [[:en:1164|1164]]). * [[:en:Hōreki|Hōreki]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1754|1754]] [[:en:July 18|July 18]]) – {{ill|Kuroda Harutaka|ja|黒田治高|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuroda Harutaka|1=Kuroda Harutaka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11678626}}, the 8th lord of the Fukuoka Domain (died [[:en:1782|1782]]). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1834|1834]] [[:en:July 4|July 4]]) – {{ill|Katsura Hisatake|ja|桂久武|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katsura Hisatake|1=Katsura Hisatake|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11162562}}, a politician (died [[:en:1877|1877]]). * [[:en:Kōka|Kōka]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1847|1847]] [[:en:July 10|July 10]]) – {{ill|Monoatsukami Takami|ja|物集高見|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Monoatsukami Takami|1=Mozume Takami|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6537728}}, a scholar of national literature (died [[:en:1928|1928]]). * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1850|1850]] [[:en:July 7|July 7]]) – The first generation of the rakugo performer {{ill|Sanyūtei En'yū|ja|三遊亭圓遊|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sanyūtei En'yū|1=En'yū San'yūtei|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11357497}}, a famed storyteller (died [[:en:1907|1907]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Gangyō|Gangyō]] 4th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:880|880]] [[:en:July 9|July 9]]) – [[:en:Ariwara no Narihira|Ariwara no Narihira]], a renowned waka poet and one of the Six Immortals of Poetry (born [[:en:825|825]]). * [[:en:Kenkyū|Kenkyū]] 4th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1193|1193]] [[:en:June 28|June 28]]) – [[:en:Soga Sukenari|Soga Yūsēi]], a samurai and elder brother among the Soga brothers (born [[:en:1172|1172]]). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 20th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1615|1615]] [[:en:June 24|June 24]]) – [[:en:Katagiri Katsumoto|Katagiri Kagetora]], a daimyō (born [[:en:1556|1556]]).

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 28 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月28日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 28일]][[zh_min_nan:5 goe̍h 28 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:五月廿八]][[zh:五月廿八]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 28 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月28日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 28일]][[zh_min_nan:5 goe̍h 28 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:五月廿八]][[zh:五月廿八]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 28 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月28日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 28일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 28 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月廿八]][[zh:五月廿八]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q839548]] Wikidata name: 28th day of the 5th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:07, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|May 28|qq=May 28}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月廿八|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 28일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 28''' is the 28th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|WD=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Kenkyū|Kenkyū]] 4th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1193|1193]] [[:en:June 28|June 28]]) – The brothers [[:en:Soga Sukenari|Soga Yūsēi]] and [[:en:Soga Tokimune|Soga Tokitomi]] avenged their father, [[:en:Kawazu Sukeyasu|Kawazu Yūtai]], by killing their enemy, [[:en:Kudō Suketsune|Kudō Yūkine]], during the conflict known as [[:en:Genkō War|Genkō no Ran]].<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://example.com|title=Reference needed|accessdate=2021-04|qq=}}</ref> * [[:en:Yuanhe|Genna]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1615|1615]] [[:en:June 1|June 1]]) – The shogun, [[:en:Tokugawa Ieyasu|Tokugawa Ieyasu]], mobilized his forces to confront the situation during the summer siege of Osaka. * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenmei]] 6th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1786|1786]] [[:en:June 1|June 1]]) – Under orders from the Tokugawa shogunate, the commander [[:en:Mogami Tokunai|Saigō Tokunai]] landed on 【Oki Province】 (隠岐) to secure the area. == Births == * [[:en:Gen'ei|Gen'ei]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1119|1119]] [[:en:July 7|July 7]]) – [[:en:Emperor Sutoku|Tendoku Tennō]], the 75th Emperor of Japan (died [[:en:1164|1164]]). * [[:en:Hōreki|Hōreki]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1754|1754]] [[:en:July 18|July 18]]) – {{ill|Kuroda Harutaka|ja|黒田治高|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuroda Harutaka|1=Kuroda Harutaka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11678626}}, the 8th lord of the Fukuoka Domain (died [[:en:1782|1782]]). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1834|1834]] [[:en:July 4|July 4]]) – {{ill|Katsura Hisatake|ja|桂久武|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katsura Hisatake|1=Katsura Hisatake|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11162562}}, a politician (died [[:en:1877|1877]]). * [[:en:Kōka|Kōka]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1847|1847]] [[:en:July 10|July 10]]) – {{ill|Monoatsukami Takami|ja|物集高見|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Monoatsukami Takami|1=Mozume Takami|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6537728}}, a scholar of national literature (died [[:en:1928|1928]]). * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1850|1850]] [[:en:July 7|July 7]]) – The first generation of the rakugo performer {{ill|Sanyūtei En'yū|ja|三遊亭圓遊|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sanyūtei En'yū|1=En'yū San'yūtei|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11357497}}, a famed storyteller (died [[:en:1907|1907]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Gangyō|Gangyō]] 4th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:880|880]] [[:en:July 9|July 9]]) – [[:en:Ariwara no Narihira|Ariwara no Narihira]], a renowned waka poet and one of the Six Immortals of Poetry (born [[:en:825|825]]). * [[:en:Kenkyū|Kenkyū]] 4th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1193|1193]] [[:en:June 28|June 28]]) – [[:en:Soga Sukenari|Soga Yūsēi]], a samurai and elder brother among the Soga brothers (born [[:en:1172|1172]]). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 20th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1615|1615]] [[:en:June 24|June 24]]) – [[:en:Katagiri Katsumoto|Katagiri Kagetora]], a daimyō (born [[:en:1556|1556]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|27|5|29|4|28|6|5|0528|qq=}}
== References == {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月廿八|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 28일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 28''' is the 28th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|WD=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Kenkyū|Kenkyū]] 4th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1193|1193]] [[:en:June 28|June 28]]) – The brothers [[:en:Soga Sukenari|Soga Yūsēi]] and [[:en:Soga Tokimune|Soga Tokitomi]] avenged their father, [[:en:Kawazu Sukeyasu|Kawazu Yūtai]], by killing their enemy, [[:en:Kudō Suketsune|Kudō Yūkine]], during the conflict known as [[:en:Genkō War|Genkō no Ran]].<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://example.com|title=Reference needed|accessdate=2021-04|qq=}}</ref> * [[:en:Yuanhe|Genna]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1615|1615]] [[:en:June 1|June 1]]) – The shogun, [[:en:Tokugawa Ieyasu|Tokugawa Ieyasu]], mobilized his forces to confront the situation during the summer siege of Osaka. * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenmei]] 6th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1786|1786]] [[:en:June 1|June 1]]) – Under orders from the Tokugawa shogunate, the commander [[:en:Mogami Tokunai|Saigō Tokunai]] landed on 【Oki Province】 (隠岐) to secure the area. == Births == * [[:en:Gen'ei|Gen'ei]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1119|1119]] [[:en:July 7|July 7]]) – [[:en:Emperor Sutoku|Tendoku Tennō]], the 75th Emperor of Japan (died [[:en:1164|1164]]). * [[:en:Hōreki|Hōreki]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1754|1754]] [[:en:July 18|July 18]]) – {{ill|Kuroda Harutaka|ja|黒田治高|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuroda Harutaka|1=Kuroda Harutaka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11678626}}, the 8th lord of the Fukuoka Domain (died [[:en:1782|1782]]). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1834|1834]] [[:en:July 4|July 4]]) – {{ill|Katsura Hisatake|ja|桂久武|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katsura Hisatake|1=Katsura Hisatake|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11162562}}, a politician (died [[:en:1877|1877]]). * [[:en:Kōka|Kōka]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1847|1847]] [[:en:July 10|July 10]]) – {{ill|Monoatsukami Takami|ja|物集高見|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Monoatsukami Takami|1=Mozume Takami|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6537728}}, a scholar of national literature (died [[:en:1928|1928]]). * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1850|1850]] [[:en:July 7|July 7]]) – The first generation of the rakugo performer {{ill|Sanyūtei En'yū|ja|三遊亭圓遊|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sanyūtei En'yū|1=En'yū San'yūtei|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11357497}}, a famed storyteller (died [[:en:1907|1907]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Gangyō|Gangyō]] 4th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:880|880]] [[:en:July 9|July 9]]) – [[:en:Ariwara no Narihira|Ariwara no Narihira]], a renowned waka poet and one of the Six Immortals of Poetry (born [[:en:825|825]]). * [[:en:Kenkyū|Kenkyū]] 4th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1193|1193]] [[:en:June 28|June 28]]) – [[:en:Soga Sukenari|Soga Yūsēi]], a samurai and elder brother among the Soga brothers (born [[:en:1172|1172]]). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 20th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1615|1615]] [[:en:June 24|June 24]]) – [[:en:Katagiri Katsumoto|Katagiri Kagetora]], a daimyō (born [[:en:1556|1556]]).

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 28 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月28日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 28일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 28 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月廿八]][[zh:五月廿八]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 28 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月28日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 28일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 28 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月廿八]][[zh:五月廿八]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 28 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月28日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 28일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 28 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月廿八]][[zh:五月廿八]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q839548]] Wikidata name: 28th day of the 5th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:07, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|May 28|qq=May 28}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月廿八|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 28일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 28''' is the 28th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|WD=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Kenkyū|Kenkyū]] 4th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1193|1193]] [[:en:June 28|June 28]]) – The brothers [[:en:Soga Sukenari|Soga Yūsēi]] and [[:en:Soga Tokimune|Soga Tokitomi]] avenged their father, [[:en:Kawazu Sukeyasu|Kawazu Yūtai]], by killing their enemy, [[:en:Kudō Suketsune|Kudō Yūkine]], during the conflict known as [[:en:Genkō War|Genkō no Ran]].<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://example.com|title=Reference needed|accessdate=2021-04|qq=}}</ref> * [[:en:Yuanhe|Genna]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1615|1615]] [[:en:June 1|June 1]]) – The shogun, [[:en:Tokugawa Ieyasu|Tokugawa Ieyasu]], mobilized his forces to confront the situation during the summer siege of Osaka. * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenmei]] 6th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1786|1786]] [[:en:June 1|June 1]]) – Under orders from the Tokugawa shogunate, the commander [[:en:Mogami Tokunai|Saigō Tokunai]] landed on 【Oki Province】 (隠岐) to secure the area. == Births == * [[:en:Gen'ei|Gen'ei]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1119|1119]] [[:en:July 7|July 7]]) – [[:en:Emperor Sutoku|Tendoku Tennō]], the 75th Emperor of Japan (died [[:en:1164|1164]]). * [[:en:Hōreki|Hōreki]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1754|1754]] [[:en:July 18|July 18]]) – {{ill|Kuroda Harutaka|ja|黒田治高|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuroda Harutaka|1=Kuroda Harutaka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11678626}}, the 8th lord of the Fukuoka Domain (died [[:en:1782|1782]]). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1834|1834]] [[:en:July 4|July 4]]) – {{ill|Katsura Hisatake|ja|桂久武|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katsura Hisatake|1=Katsura Hisatake|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11162562}}, a politician (died [[:en:1877|1877]]). * [[:en:Kōka|Kōka]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1847|1847]] [[:en:July 10|July 10]]) – {{ill|Monoatsukami Takami|ja|物集高見|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Monoatsukami Takami|1=Mozume Takami|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6537728}}, a scholar of national literature (died [[:en:1928|1928]]). * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1850|1850]] [[:en:July 7|July 7]]) – The first generation of the rakugo performer {{ill|Sanyūtei En'yū|ja|三遊亭圓遊|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sanyūtei En'yū|1=En'yū San'yūtei|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11357497}}, a famed storyteller (died [[:en:1907|1907]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Gangyō|Gangyō]] 4th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:880|880]] [[:en:July 9|July 9]]) – [[:en:Ariwara no Narihira|Ariwara no Narihira]], a renowned waka poet and one of the Six Immortals of Poetry (born [[:en:825|825]]). * [[:en:Kenkyū|Kenkyū]] 4th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1193|1193]] [[:en:June 28|June 28]]) – [[:en:Soga Sukenari|Soga Yūsēi]], a samurai and elder brother among the Soga brothers (born [[:en:1172|1172]]). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 20th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1615|1615]] [[:en:June 24|June 24]]) – [[:en:Katagiri Katsumoto|Katagiri Kagetora]], a daimyō (born [[:en:1556|1556]]).

Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|WD=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Kenkyū|en|Kenkyū|WD=Q1193933|lt=Kenkyū}} 4th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1193|en|1193|WD=Q19741|lt=1193}} {{ill|June 28|en|June 28|WD=Q2660|lt=June 28}}) – The brothers {{ill|Soga Sukenari|en|Soga Sukenari|WD=Q11515406|lt=Soga Yūsēi}} and {{ill|Soga Tokimune|en|Soga Tokimune|WD=Q11515401|lt=Soga Tokitomi}} avenged their father, {{ill|Kawazu Sukeyasu|en|Kawazu Sukeyasu|WD=Q11553998|lt=Kawazu Yūtai}}, by killing their enemy, {{ill|Kudō Suketsune|en|Kudō Suketsune|WD=Q11479615|lt=Kudō Yūkine}}, during the conflict known as {{ill|Genkō War|en|Genkō War|WD=Q1432624|lt=Genkō no Ran}}.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://example.com|title=Reference needed|accessdate=2021-04|qq=}}</ref> * {{ill|Yuanhe|en|Yuanhe|WD=Q10889567|lt=Genna}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1615|en|1615|WD=Q6784|lt=1615}} {{ill|June 1|en|June 1|WD=Q2625|lt=June 1}}) – The shogun, {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|en|Tokugawa Ieyasu|WD=Q171977|lt=Tokugawa Ieyasu}}, mobilized his forces to confront the situation during the summer siege of Osaka. * area. == Births == * {{ill|Gen'ei|en|Gen'ei|WD=Q1193613|lt=Gen'ei}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1119|en|1119|WD=Q19540|lt=1119}} {{ill|July {{Not to be confused with|May 28|qq=May 28}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月廿八|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 28일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 28''' is the 28th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|WD=Q96759840|1=tomobiki}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Kenkyū|en|Kenkyū|WD=Q1193933|lt=Kenkyū|1=Kenkyū}} 4th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1193|en|1193|WD=Q19741|lt=1193|1=1193}} {{ill|June 28|en|June 28|WD=Q2660|lt=June 28|1=June 28}}) – The brothers {{ill|Soga Sukenari|en|Soga Sukenari|WD=Q11515406|lt=Soga Yūsēi|1=Soga Sukenari}} and {{ill|Soga Tokimune|en|Soga Tokimune|WD=Q11515401|lt=Soga Tokitomi|1=Soga Tokimune}} avenged their father, {{ill|Kawazu Sukeyasu|en|Kawazu Sukeyasu|WD=Q11553998|lt=Kawazu Yūtai|1=Kawazu Sukeyasu}}, by killing their enemy, {{ill|Kudō Suketsune|en|Kudō Suketsune|WD=Q11479615|lt=Kudō Yūkine|1=Kudō Suketsune}}, during the conflict known as {{ill|Genkō War|en|Genkō War|WD=Q1432624|lt=Genkō no Ran|1=Genkō War}}.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://example.com|title=Reference needed|accessdate=2021-04|qq=}}</ref> * {{ill|Yuanhe|en|Yuanhe|WD=Q10889567|lt=Genna|1=Yuanhe}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1615|en|1615|WD=Q6784|lt=1615|1=1615}} {{ill|June 1|en|June 1|WD=Q2625|lt=June 1|1=June 1}}) – The shogun, {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|en|Tokugawa Ieyasu|WD=Q171977|lt=Tokugawa Ieyasu|1=Tokugawa Ieyasu}}, mobilized his forces to confront the situation during the summer siege of Osaka. * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|WD=Q1369045|lt=Tenmei|1=Tenpō}} 6th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1786|en|1786|WD=Q7760|lt=1786|1=1786}} {{ill|June 1|en|June 1|WD=Q2625|lt=June 1|1=June 1}}) – Under orders from the Tokugawa shogunate, the commander {{ill|Mogami Tokunai|en|Mogami Tokunai|WD=Q4141812|lt=Saigō Tokunai|1=Mogami Tokunai}} landed on 【Oki Province】 (隠岐) to secure the area. == Births == * {{ill|Gen'ei|en|Gen'ei|WD=Q1193613|lt=Gen'ei|1=Gen'ei}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1119|en|1119|WD=Q19540|lt=1119|1=1119}} {{ill|July 7|en|July 7|WD=Q2694|lt=July 7|1=July 7}}) – {{ill|Emperor Sutoku|en|Emperor Sutoku|WD=Q349287|lt=Tendoku Tennō|1=Emperor Sutoku}}, the 75th Emperor of Japan (died {{ill|1164|en|1164|WD=Q19674|lt=1164|1=1164}}). * {{ill|Hōreki|en|Hōreki|WD=Q1194397|lt=Hōreki|1=Hōreki}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1754|en|1754|WD=Q7623|lt=1754|1=1754}} {{ill|July 18|en|July 18|WD=Q2730|lt=July 18|1=July 18}}) – {{ill|Kuroda Harutaka|ja|黒田治高|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuroda Harutaka|1=Q11678626|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11678626}}, the 8th lord of the Fukuoka Domain (died {{ill|1782|en|1782|WD=Q7740|lt=1782|1=1782}}). * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|WD=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō|1=Tenpō}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1834|en|1834|WD=Q7591|lt=1834|1=1834}} {{ill|July 4|en|July 4|WD=Q2698|lt=July 4|1=July 4}}) – {{ill|Katsura Hisatake|ja|桂久武|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katsura Hisatake|1=Katsura Hisatake|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11162562}}, a politician (died {{ill|1877|en|1877|WD=Q7773|lt=1877|1=1877}}). * {{ill|Kōka|en|Kōka|WD=Q1325317|lt=Kōka|1=Kōka}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1847|en|1847|WD=Q7644|lt=1847|1=1847}} {{ill|July 10|en|July 10|WD=Q2689|lt=July 10|1=July 10}}) – {{ill|Monoatsukami Takami|ja|物集高見|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Monoatsukami Takami|1=Mozume Takami|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6537728}}, a scholar of national literature (died {{ill|1928|en|1928|WD=Q19715|lt=1928|1=1928}}). * {{ill|Kaei|en|Kaei|WD=Q1146125|lt=Kaei|1=Kaei}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1850|en|1850|WD=Q7653|lt=1850|1=1850}} {{ill|July 7|en|July 7|WD=Q2694|lt=July 7|1=July 7}}) – The first generation of the rakugo performer {{ill|Sanyūtei En'yū|ja|三遊亭圓遊|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sanyūtei En'yū|1=En'yū San'yūtei|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11357497}}, a famed storyteller (died {{ill|1907|en|1907|WD=Q2048|lt=1907|1=1907}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Gangyō|en|Gangyō|WD=Q747451|lt=Gangyō|1=Gangyō}} 4th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|880|en|880|WD=Q23618|lt=880|1=880}} {{ill|July 9|en|July 9|WD=Q2690|lt=July 9|1=July 9}}) – {{ill|Ariwara no Narihira|en|Ariwara no Narihira|WD=Q451991|lt=Ariwara no Narihira|1=Ariwara no Narihira}}, a renowned waka poet and one of the Six Immortals of Poetry (born {{ill|825|en|825|WD=Q24624|lt=825|1=825}}). * {{ill|Kenkyū|en|Kenkyū|WD=Q1193933|lt=Kenkyū|1=Kenkyū}} 4th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1193|en|1193|WD=Q19741|lt=1193|1=1193}} {{ill|June 28|en|June 28|WD=Q2660|lt=June 28|1=June 28}}) – {{ill|Soga Sukenari|en|Soga Sukenari|WD=Q11515406|lt=Soga Yūsēi|1=Soga Sukenari}}, a samurai and elder brother among the Soga brothers (born {{ill|1172|en|1172|WD=Q19687|lt=1172|1=1172}}). * {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|WD=Q1328185|lt=Keichō|1=Keichō}} 20th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1615|en|1615|WD=Q6784|lt=1615|1=1615}} {{ill|June 24|en|June 24|WD=Q2665|lt=June 24|1=June 24}}) – {{ill|Katagiri Katsumoto|en|Katagiri Katsumoto|WD=Q1882775|lt=Katagiri Kagetora|1=Katagiri Katsumoto}}, a daimyō (born {{ill|1556|en|1556|WD=Q6590|lt=1556|1=1556}}).

Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|WD=Q96759840|1=tomobiki}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Kenkyū|en|Kenkyū|WD=Q1193933|lt=Kenkyū|1=Kenkyū}} 4th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1193|en|1193|WD=Q19741|lt=1193|1=1193}} {{ill|June 28|en|June 28|WD=Q2660|lt=June 28|1=June 28}}) – The brothers {{ill|Soga Sukenari|en|Soga Sukenari|WD=Q11515406|lt=Soga Yūsēi|1=Soga Sukenari}} and {{ill|Soga Tokimune|en|Soga Tokimune|WD=Q11515401|lt=Soga Tokitomi|1=Soga Tokimune}} avenged their father, {{ill|Kawazu Sukeyasu|en|Kawazu Sukeyasu|WD=Q11553998|lt=Kawazu Yūtai|1=Kawazu Sukeyasu}}, by killing their enemy, {{ill|Kudō Suketsune|en|Kudō Suketsune|WD=Q11479615|lt=Kudō Yūkine|1=Kudō Suketsune}}, during the conflict known as {{ill|Genkō War|en|Genkō 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1615|en|1615|WD=Q6784|lt=1615|1=1615}} {{ill|June 1|en|June 1|WD=Q2625|lt=June
